summary: Possible accessibility barriers found in the contact page of Fable

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some images may not have useful alt text
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users who rely on screen readers or have visual impairments may not be able to understand the content of these images
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Multiple instances of missing image alt text were detected in the page

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some text may have low contrast with its background
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users with visual impairments may have difficulty reading text with low contrast, which could impact their ability to understand the content
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Multiple instances of low contrast text were detected in the page

outreach_notes: We suggest reviewing the contact page for potential accessibility issues, particularly with regards to image alt text and text contrast
limitations: AI Scout findings are suggestions and need human review.
AI Scout output is not a confirmed accessibility finding.
AI Scout does not determine legal compliance, WCAG compliance, or screen-reader behavior.
